notes: Main menu with PLAY · SETTINGS · ACCOUNT · QUIT instead of dropping straight into combat. Settings panel (volume, fullscreen, neon bloom). Local nickname (server-side coming next). Bloom tuned so colors aren't washed out. ESC during a match returns to menu.
launcher_notes: Self-update support. From now on the launcher updates itself automatically when a newer build is published. News + classes panels fixed. Steam ID display formatting fixed.
